prompt:
Ultra-realistic candid street-style fashion photo of a young woman captured from a high elevated telephoto angle while walking briskly on a dark interlocking-brick pedestrian path. Bright natural sunlight illuminates the center and right side of the walkway, while a deep shadow covers the left edge. A white roadside railing with several white cylindrical posts runs along the right side.

The woman has fair skin, a natural healthy complexion, a soft cheerful smile, and realistic facial features. Medium-brown hair is tied back in a low ponytail with a few loose strands moving naturally. Small wireless earbuds are visible. She wears a dark green baseball cap with a white embroidered “NY” logo, the brim casting a realistic shadow over her eyes.

She is photographed nearly full-body from above, mid-stride, facing slightly toward the camera. Her right hand adjusts the cap brim while her left arm holds a large chunky cream-colored knitted scarf/bundle across her torso. Left leg forward, right leg back, posture energetic and candid, with physically accurate movement.

Wardrobe: oversized dark-brown wool overcoat worn open and naturally swinging with motion; underneath, a loose cream/off-white utilitarian jumpsuit with visible bib, stitching, pockets, and subtle faded blue text reading “REG. U.S. PAT. OFF.”; pale-blue collared shirt underneath with visible cuffs. Rolled trouser hems, white socks, and white low-top sneakers with turquoise/mint-green accents.

Hard midday sunlight creates crisp shadows on pavement and clothing. Realistic wool, cotton, knit, and shoe textures; natural skin detail; believable wrinkles, folds, and fabric compression. Subject shadow visible on the ground. Warm-neutral editorial color grading, slight telephoto compression (85–135mm), moderate depth of field, subtle grain, authentic paparazzi/editorial street-photography feel. Vertical 3:4 composition, subject slightly right of center, full body visible, genuine outdoor documentary-fashion realism, not CGI or AI-generated.
